case_title: GARCIA, HERIBERTO vs. FLATEN, ELKE HELENE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA, HERIBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT FLATEN, ELKE  HELENE DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-09-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-11-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-20-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-09-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON NOV-09-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR DEC-12-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-12-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), CONTINUED OSC FOR PLAINTIFF. HEARING SET FOR FEB-20-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-20-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-20-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR PLAINTIFF: $250.00 SANCTIONS IMPOSED BUT STAYED UNTIL 3/12/96 PENDING OUTCOME OF PLAINTIFF'S ATTY'S MOTION TO WITHDRAW. HEARING SET FOR APR-22-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA, HERIBERTO HEARING SET FOR MAR-12-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, CALENDAR OF MAR-12-1996, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE. PLAINTIFF COUNSEL TO PREPARE ORDER; $250.00 SANCTIONS PERMANENTLY STAYED. 4/22/96, A STATUS CONFERENCE ONLY. PLAINTIFF TO APPEAR.
ORDER GRANTING WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR CLAIMANT
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR GROSSMAN, PAUL AS ATTORNEY FOR GARCIA, HERIBERTO
PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER GRANTING WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR CLAIMANT, FILED BY P. GROSSMAN, SERVED ON ON PLTF HERIBERTO, GARCIA, BY MAIL ON APR 3, 1996

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-22-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-22-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAY-22-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-22-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAY-22-1996, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO APPEAR AND/OR FAILS TO OFFER GOOD CAUSE THE COURT WILL DISMISS THIS CASE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-15-1996 CONTINUED FROM MAY-22-1996 TO JUN-20-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
